name: agent-loops
description: Multi-agent workflow orchestrator. Use when the user asks to: build/create/make/ship/develop/launch an app, webapp, website, iPhone app, Android app, mobile app, desktop app, API, service, tool, CLI, extension, plugin, bot, dashboard, landing page, SaaS, MVP, prototype, or any software project; fix/debug/troubleshoot/diagnose a bug, error, crash, or issue; review/audit/inspect/check/analyze code or security; research/investigate/compare/explore/study a topic or write a report; refactor/restructure/clean up/reorganize/optimize/modernize code; or publish/deploy/release a skill to ClawHub. Routes each step to the right agent (PM, Dev, Tester, Reviewer, Editor, Researcher, Architect) and chains outputs. Run: python3 workspace/skills/agent-loops/scripts/run_workflow.py <workflow> "<input>" --apply
author: Austin
